global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting DriftPass with flexible booking options at an attractive price.

elements.label: Orange abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: DriftPass
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'DriftPass' prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Fly smarter text
elements.description: A smaller, white text that reads 'Fly smarter' positioned centrally, conveying a clear message.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: A white text below 'Fly smarter' that states 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information.

elements.label: Price €19.99
elements.description: A prominent price tag in white text reading '€19.99' located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Watch now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A small circular shape in a lighter shade of orange, adding visual interest to the design.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape in a lighter orange color, contributing to the abstract background.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, indistinct element located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center of the ad, details are unclear.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo of DriftPass displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Flexible booking options text
elements.description: Text that elaborates on the service, emphasizing flexibility in booking.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call to action encouraging viewers to engage with the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, DriftPass, flexible booking options, €19.99.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
